Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const ev = require\('./src/agents/evaluationAgent'\); const mv = require\('./src/agents/motivationAgent'\); const res = ev.evaluateRisk\({timeDeviation: 0.3, completionRate: 0.6, score: 75}\); console.log\('Evaluation:', JSON.stringify\(res, null, 2\)\); const mot = mv.generateMotivation\(res.level, { strategyKey: res.strategyKey }\); console.log\('Motivation arcsMotivation:', JSON.stringify\(mot.arcsMotivation, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const ev = require\('./src/agents/evaluationAgent'\); const mv = require\('./src/agents/motivationAgent'\); // 高风险 const high = ev.evaluateRisk\({timeDeviation: 0.8, completionRate: 0.3, score: 40}\); console.log\('高风险 strategyKey:', high.strategyKey\); const mh = mv.generateMotivation\(high.level, { strategyKey: high.strategyKey }\); console.log\('  -> message:', mh.arcsMotivation.message\); // 低风险 const low = ev.evaluateRisk\({timeDeviation: -0.1, completionRate: 0.9, score: 90}\); console.log\('低风险 strategyKey:', low.strategyKey\); const ml = mv.generateMotivation\(low.level, { strategyKey: low.strategyKey }\); console.log\('  -> message:', ml.arcsMotivation.message\);")

Bash(node -e "const ev = require\('./src/agents/evaluationAgent'\); const mv = require\('./src/agents/motivationAgent'\); const tests = [{name:'高风险',d:{timeDeviation: 0.8, completionRate: 0.3, score: 40}},{name:'低风险',d:{timeDeviation: -0.1, completionRate: 0.9, score: 90}}]; tests.forEach\(t=>{const r=ev.evaluateRisk\(t.d\);const m=mv.generateMotivation\(r.level,{strategyKey:r.strategyKey}\);console.log\(t.name+':',r.strategyKey,'->',m.arcsMotivation?m.arcsMotivation.message.substring\(0,20\)+'...':'no arcsmotivation'\);}\)")
Bash(node -e "const {CoreAgent, REQUEST_TYPES} = require\('./src/agents'\); console.log\('CoreAgent loaded'\); console.log\('REQUEST_TYPES:', JSON.stringify\(REQUEST_TYPES\)\);")
